name: OC Kindergarten Bridge
description: Projects OpenClaw lifecycle hooks into OC Kindergarten through static v1 or server-bound v2 identity.

pairingEndpoint.label: OC Kindergarten pairing endpoint
pairingEndpoint.help: Optional full /api/runtime/enrollments/pair URL; derived from endpoint by default.

identityMode.label: Agent identity mode
identityMode.help: Use server for dynamic provider binding; static keeps the legacy local agentMap path.

unmappedAgentPolicy.label: Unmapped OpenClaw Agent policy
unmappedAgentPolicy.help: Skip unknown native Agent IDs by default; use default only for legacy compatibility.
